description: Portable template-metadata enforcement policy. Repos can keep the same guard logic and customize scope by editing ordered rules here.

rules.name: behaviors
rules.notes: Planned next rollout slice after handlers.

rules.name: guides
rules.notes: Guides mostly need additive type/status keys.

rules.name: matrices
rules.notes: Decision matrices are modular templates and the index stays exempt as an aggregate navigation entry.

rules.name: registry-components
rules.notes: Registry component modules are enforced; the modular index and migration report stay exempt as aggregate references.

rules.name: engine-modules
rules.notes: Engine module docs are enforced; narrative/report docs stay exempt where they intentionally remain outside the modular policy.

rules.name: shared-core-patterns
rules.notes: Singleton shared core pattern kept explicit so the portable policy still owns its canonical metadata requirements.
